creator: thefloridaqueenie
caption:
Looking for things to do around Florida? Comment "Guide" and I'll send you my interactive Florida map and guide with over 1,000 spots to explore! I did the work for you so you can just hit the road without hours of research and stress!

You need to add North Shore Cafe to your next trip to Anna Maria Island! I love their cute outdoor dining area right on the water and their locally sourced menu and Pop Shop with some boozy options! Where else should I try on AMI? 🩵🩵

#florida #annamariaisland #longboatkey #floridarestaurants #floridafoodie

transcription.text: I found y'all the cutest cafe on Anna Maria Island that you need to save for your next trip there. This is North Shore Cafe located at 304 Pine Avenue on Anna Maria Island and they're open for breakfast and lunch. There is no indoor dining but I love their outdoor dining area right on the water which has beautiful views lots of shade and cool breezes. I love that their menu is all locally sourced right down to the sourdough bread. I ordered the BLT on sourdough and a black berry mimosa and they were both delicious. They have a little gift shop slash pop shop where you can find some cute islandy things and fresh juice pops. They even have some boozy options. So when you need a break from all that white sand and blue water definitely check out this little cafe and follow along for more Florida content from a local.
